title: Interactive Brokers Paper Trading Account
content:
Interactive Brokers Paper Trading Account

I set up a Trading Lab for the class that simulates closely what professional traders do on a daily basis. You will have to open an account by following the link below. Once set up, your account will have $1,000,000 in paper money and full trading capability. In particular, you will be able to buy/sell domestic and internationals stocks, ETFs, and bonds, as well as currencies, futures, and options. You will also be allowed to buy securities on margin and to short-sell.

 

To open your account, please click on this link:

https://ndcdyn.interactivebrokers.com/Universal/Application?type=DEMO&code=TRADING_LAB_DIN671877 Links to an external site.

 

Please let me know if you have questions,

iulian
